query: Plot on the map the xView1 images in (wider area around) Ouagadougou, Burkina Faso, for August 2017

task0.objective: Fetch images from the xView1 dataset and filter the images specifically from Ouagadougou, Burkina Faso, for August 2017.

task1.objective: Run a processing algorithm on the filtered xView1 images to prepare them for plotting.

task2.objective: Plot the processed xView1 images on the map, ensuring accurate representation of the location.
